prose: The sign under discussion is articulated with the dominant hand assuming a five-finger spread configuration, the extended fingertips oriented along a superior vector, the palmar surface directed contralaterally. Location is established at the ipsilateral side of the forehead. The articulator executes a lateral reciprocating motion of moderate amplitude, performed biphasically.
notes: Anatomical / phonetics-style register. 'Superior vector' → up, 'contralaterally' → contralateral, 'biphasically' → twice, 'lateral reciprocating motion' → zigzag-wavy.
